title: Space Factory
description: Tech mod with focus on near-future and sci-fi atmosphere
body:
Space Factory is a sci-fi themed mod for Minecraft & Fabric loader.

As of now, the mod is far from completion and only adds 2 generators, 6 machines, a few materials, tools and building blocks. Tech progression and automation are, however, not a main focus of the mod, and as development progresses there'll be more non-tech features.

It can technically be played stand-alone, but it's not recommended and I expect you to have other mods that use Reborn Energy.

It's designed to be use with EMI for viewing recipes. REI is also supported, if you need it.
